title: Milwaukee Cold Snap
lead: A severe cold snap is affecting Milwaukee, with a Z-Score of -3.43. This event has a critical score of 10.0/10.
body:
The current weather conditions in Milwaukee are characterized by a high umidity level of 74% and a gentle wind of 6.6 km/h. 
 The Heating Degree Days (HDD) is at 13.0 GG, indicating a significant need for heating. 
 The city is experiencing a critical cold snap, with no Cooling Degree Days (CDD) recorded, at 0.0 GG.
conclusion: Activate emergency protocols to mitigate the effects of the cold snap.
